dialogs.text: The stone demands a life. It won't let go... unless I give it what it wants.
Mina, no! Step away from it! We will find another way!
There is no other way, father. I can feel the curse pulling at my very spirit. Better me than both of you.
My sweet girl... don't leave us. Please... the world is too dark without you.
The darkness is fading for you now. Tell the village... tell them I wasn't afraid. Goodbye.
